query_texts:
INSERT INTO dbo.cci_string_dict_regression (id, batch, i_item_desc, pr_review_content)
SELECT
    (pk + 1) AS id,
    CASE WHEN (pk + 1) <= 8192 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS batch,
    CASE
        WHEN (pk + 1) = 2 THEN NULL
        WHEN (pk + 1) = 1 THEN ''
        ELSE
            'ITEM-DESC-' + RIGHT('000000' + CAST((pk + 1) AS VARCHAR(6)), 6) +
            '|CLASS=' + RIGHT('00' + CAST((pk + 1) % 97 AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) +
            '|FORM=' + RIGHT('00' + CAST((pk + 1) % 17 AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) +
            '|' + REPLICATE(CHAR(65 + ((pk + 1) % 26)), 12 + ((pk + 1) % 29))
    END AS i_item_desc,
    CASE
        WHEN (pk + 1) = 2 THEN NULL
        WHEN (pk + 1) = 1 THEN ''
        ELSE
            'review-' + RIGHT('000000' + CAST((pk + 1) AS VARCHAR(6)), 6) +
            ': customer noted quality=' + CAST((pk + 1) % 11 AS VARCHAR(2)) +
            '; shipping=' + CAST((pk + 1) % 7 AS VARCHAR(2)) +
            '; value=' + CAST((pk + 1) % 13 AS VARCHAR(2)) +
            '. payload[' + REPLICATE(CHAR(97 + ((pk + 1) % 26)), 40 + ((pk + 1) % 73)) +
            '] end.'
    END AS pr_review_content
FROM fkr__seed
WHERE pk < 8192

INSERT INTO dbo.cci_string_dict_regression (id, batch, i_item_desc, pr_review_content)
SELECT
